headline: Pierre Sage
body: Pierre Sage is linked with a managerial move to Crystal Palace.
text: Crystal Palace actively pursuing Lens manager Pierre Sage to become new head coach. Talks with manager and Lens underway. Sage viewed as first-choice candidate for the position. https://t.co/c6njOHS8e5
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report
RUMOUR | Pierre Sage

Pierre Sage is linked with a managerial move to Crystal Palace.
